calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Continued To Feb-15-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Cross Complaints.
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones #3689.
Martin Goodman appeared with Cross-Complainant Herminigildo Valle.
Cross-Complainant was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by Cross-Defendants Geralde Apostol & Eliezer Poloyapoy.
Default entered against cross-defendants on 10/15/07.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of Cross-Complainant and against Defaulted Cross-Defendants: Geralde Apostol and Eliezer Poloyapoy as follows:
Damages/Principal $106,235.28
Prejudgment Interest $8,661.92
Attorney's Fees $4,500.00
Costs $520.00
Other $36.00, for a total of $119,953.20
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Off Calendar Jul-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Ed Sherman, Esq., appearing (via telephone) for plaintiff & moving party: Syneron, Inc.
Herminigildo Valle, Defendant, appearing in Propria Persona

Ruling:
Hearing held on Plaintiff Syneron, Inc's Application For Writ Of Attachment as to Defendant Herminigildo Valle. Ruling after hearing: Writ of Attachment is GRANTED in the amont of $179,032.19. The Undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000.00. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Ed Sherman, Esq., appearing (via telephone) for plaintiff & moving party: Syneron, Inc.
Herminigildo Valle, Defendant, appearing in Propria Persona

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Syneron, Inc.'s Application For Writ Of Possession as to Defendant Body Renaissance & Skin Care, Inc. And Herminigildo Valle is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's undertaking is waived. Defendants' undertaking to retain the property is set in the amount of $95,900. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
